reviews.comment:
Es la única YPF que no te emiten factura A si pagas con la aplicación

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF that doesn't issue an invoice A if you pay with the app.

reviewReply.comment: Mil disculpas son disposiciones del sistema y no somos la unica con ese criterio , gracias x el comentario saludos

reviews.comment:
Buen precio y si aprovechás el descuenta por ser socio de ACA un golazo, pero hay mucha espera las veces que fui.

(Translated by Google)
Good price and if you take advantage of the discount for being an ACA member it's a great deal, but there's a long wait every time I've been.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias cecilia , si nuestra estacion tiene mucha demanda ,saludos

reviews.comment:
Super atentos, no solo cargás combustible, vieron q tenía una luz rota y me ofrecieron cambiarla en el momento evitando así una multa

(Translated by Google)
They were incredibly helpful; they didn't just fill up the tank, they noticed I had a broken light and offered to replace it on the spot, thus avoiding a fine.
